text: To add the tracking pixel to your WordPress site, follow these steps: 1. **Log in to your WordPress Admin Dashboard.** 2. **Go to Appearance > Theme Editor.** 3. **Select the `footer.php` file** from the list on the right side. 4. **Add the following code** just before the closing `` tag: ```html ``` Make sure to replace `example-com` with your actual site slug, which is derived from your domain (e.g., for `example.com`, it would be `example-com`). 5. **Click "Update File"** to save your changes. ### Optional: Add the Script Tag If you want to also include the script tag for automatic JSON-LD schema injection, add this code to the `` section of your theme: 1. **Go to Appearance > Theme Editor.** 2. **Select the `header.php` file** from the list. 3. **Add the following code** within the `` section: ```html ``` 4. **Click "Update File"** to save your changes. Once you've added the tracking pixel, it will help monitor which AI bots visit your site. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
